title: Range-location response asymmetry
plain_language_summary_zh: 研究相同幅度冲击在四小时区间不同位置的后续响应是否不同。
falsifiable_hypothesis: Equal-magnitude hourly shocks near opposite quartiles of a fixed 4h range have different forward response distributions on approved Development data.
proposed_market_mechanism: Inventory and resting liquidity may differ near opposite sides of an established higher-timeframe range.
supporting_evidence: The approved scope includes 1h primary and 4h informative data.
contradictory_evidence: Range location may add no information after conditioning on recent trend.

source_refs.claim: The frozen state binds the approved 1h and 4h Development scope.

novelty_vs_existing_research: Tests location-conditioned response rather than proposing an executable order-book strategy.
minimal_test_method: Match fixed shock-magnitude bins and compare forward response distributions by 4h range quartile.
comparison_baseline: Shock responses without conditioning on 4h range location.
falsification_conditions: Range quartile adds no stable response difference after fixed trend conditioning.
stop_conditions: Stop after fixed quartile and trend controls; do not search alternative partitions.
known_limitations: OHLCV range location is only a proxy for market structure.
